testsuite.name: com.billing.charge.calculation.internal.context.ChargeContextPropertyTest

timestamp = 2026-02-27T18:12:12.013146, ChargeContextPropertyTest:addedPeriodResultsMustBeQueryableAndUnmodified = |-----------------------jqwik----------------------- tries = 100 | # of calls to property checks = 100 | # of not rejected calls generation = RANDOMIZED | parameters are randomly generated after-failure = SAMPLE_FIRST | try previously failed sample, then previous seed when-fixed-seed = ALLOW | fixing the random seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 41 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 17 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = 4848912651988540399 | random seed to reproduce generated values

timestamp = 2026-02-27T18:12:12.092355, ChargeContextPropertyTest:subsequentAdditionsDoNotAffectPreviousResults = |-----------------------jqwik----------------------- tries = 100 | # of calls to property checks = 100 | # of not rejected calls generation = RANDOMIZED | parameters are randomly generated after-failure = SAMPLE_FIRST | try previously failed sample, then previous seed when-fixed-seed = ALLOW | fixing the random seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 120 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 21 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = 978167207198381913 | random seed to reproduce generated values
testsuite.system-err: 2월 27, 2026 6:12:12 오후 net.jqwik.engine.properties.RandomizedShrinkablesGenerator logEdgeCasesOutnumberTriesIfApplicable 정보: Edge case generation exceeds number of tries. Stopped after 120 generated cases.
